cross_border_flows.rationale: Specific cloud provider (AWS) with named locations (Singapore, US, Philippines) and contractual safeguards.

automated_decision_making.rationale: Four ADM purposes disclosed with human review opt-out mechanism available.

third_party_sharing.rationale: Law enforcement sharing with statutory basis cited. Advertising partner sharing with consent. No data broker sales explicitly stated.

childrens_data.rationale: Age threshold (16) with parental consent and 30-day deletion commitment.

data_security.rationale: ISO 27001 certified, TLS encryption, penetration testing, 24/7 SOC, and 72-hour breach notification.

consumer_rights.rationale: Online portal for access/correction and deletion rights but limited detail on response timeframes.
